title: HTTP client with signed GETs for remote actor fetching
description: Implement an HTTP client capable of making signed GET requests for fetching remote actor documents and posts. Uses reqwest with rustls-tls. Outbound GETs must be signed with the fetching actor's keypair (draft-cavage-http-signatures-11) because GoToSocial and others require authorized fetch. Sign: (request-target), host, date.
design: Use activitypub-federation crate's HTTP signing primitives. keyId = {actor_uri}#main-key. Sign with the fetching persona's private key. Use instance-level signing actor for fetches not associated with a specific persona.
acceptance_criteria: Can fetch a remote actor document from mastodon.social with proper Accept header; GoToSocial accepts the signed fetch; Date header is UTC RFC 7231 format within 30s of now; Accept: application/activity+json, application/ld+json; profile=...
